ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Main email address for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension number of the staff member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Personal phone number of the staff member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is currently active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the staff member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department head */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the department head */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department the department head belongs to */,
  "head_start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member became department head */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ceased being a department head */,
  "is_current_head" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is currently the head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_heads_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_assistants" (
  "assistant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative assistant */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the administrative assistant */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department the administrative assistant belongs to */,
  "assistant_start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member became administrative assistant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member ceased being an administrative assistant */,
  "is_current_assistant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is currently an assistant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assistant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_administrative_assistants_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the assigned role */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the staff member */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role was revoked from the staff member */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES staff_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_role_assignments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departmental_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departmental hierarchy */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department the hierarchy belongs to */,
  "parent_dept_id" INTEGER /* Parent department of the department */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the department in the hierarchy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the hierarchy entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the hierarchy entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departmental_hierarchy_parent_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departmental_hierarchy_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff hierarchy */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the supervisor */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the staff member in the hierarchy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the hierarchy entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the hierarchy entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_hierarchy_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_hierarchy_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member accessing the directory */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the department being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission assignment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Permission ID of the assigned permission */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned to the staff member */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was revoked from the staff member */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_assignments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_assignments_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
